name: Ana Himura
description:
#9

Sister Ana, a compassionate nun, had lived to Serenity Grove to serve the small community. Her devotion to the church and the well-being of the villagers endeared her to everyone.

(ALSO: if you want me to change the effect of the percentage please do so.) CORRUPTION PERCENTAGES:
